diffSummary: Sticker slice of rich messaging: zca-desktop can now render, send, and receive Zalo stickers, with a composer sticker picker (Gần đây + per-pack tabs + search) and restart-persistent sticker history. types/sticker.rs adds a non-secret Sticker DTO (id, catId, type, render url) re-exported from types/mod.rs and carried on IncomingMessage (types/events.rs) and StoredMessage (types/stored.rs). zalo/mod.rs maps an incoming msgType=chat.sticker into a Sticker (sticker_from_content; numeric ids survive zca-rust's untagged MessageContent::Other), builds the Zalo emoticon CDN render URL (sticker_image_url, host already in the CSP img-src allowlist), and wraps the zca-rust facade for send_sticker, search_stickers, and sticker_category (get_sticker_category_detail) with zca-rust types confined to the zalo layer. session/ reuses the per-account send throttle (ban-risk r1) for stickers. store/db.rs migrates the schema (v2 sticker columns on messages + v3 recent_stickers table) and adds save_sticker_message (echo-dedupe), load_recent_messages sticker reconstruction, and record_recent_sticker/load_recent_stickers/load_recent_sticker_categories (recent + derived pack tabs, since Zalo exposes no owned-packs endpoint). command/mod.rs adds send_sticker + search_stickers + recent_stickers + sticker_categories + sticker_category, routes incoming stickers through save_sticker_message, and records recents on send; lib.rs registers the new commands. Frontend (covered by the npm build/check checks) adds the StickerPicker and sticker bubble rendering. No credential or token value crosses IPC; sticker payloads are non-secret display data.

checks.name: tests
checks.summary: cargo test offline suite passes including the sticker mapping + persistence tests (sticker_from_content, sticker_image_url, to_sticker, store sticker_message_persists_and_reloads, recent_stickers_track_usage_and_categories).

checks.name: lint
checks.summary: cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings clean with the sticker DTO, zalo mapping/send/search, store migration + repositories, and command wiring.

checks.name: build
checks.summary: cargo build compiles the full sticker slice (types/zalo/session/store/command + lib registration).

checks.name: ui
checks.summary: svelte-check 0/0 then npm run build succeeds with the StickerPicker (Gần đây + pack tabs + search) and sticker bubble rendering wired into the chat pane composer.

checks.name: smoke
checks.summary: Live: search_sticker returned 24 stickers and a real sticker was delivered to the authorized recipient (Zalo returned a 13-char message id). Non-secret diagnostics only (counts + lengths, never recipient/token).

knownRisks.description: Zalo/zca-rust expose no list-owned-sticker-packs endpoint, so the picker's pack tabs are derived from the cat_ids of recently-used stickers (local SQLite history) plus search, rather than the user's full owned-pack catalog.
knownRisks.acceptanceReason: An explicit non-goal of the sticker slice (the contract notes Zalo has no owned-packs endpoint). Recent + search covers the common case; a full catalog is a later slice if an endpoint is found.
knownRisks.mitigation: If an owned-packs endpoint is later verified in zca-rust, add a sticker_packs command and replace the derived tabs.

knownRisks.description: Sticker rows persist non-secret metadata (sticker id/cat/type/url, body '[Sticker]') in plaintext in the local SQLite store, consistent with message-cache's plaintext message bodies (ADR-0005 whole-DB encryption deferred).
knownRisks.acceptanceReason: Sticker metadata is public display data, not a bearer token. Matches the already-accepted message-cache plaintext-at-rest posture; the credential triple remains AES-256-GCM encrypted.
knownRisks.mitigation: Whole-DB encryption (deferred to a future ADR per ADR-0005) would cover this.
